mood: Premium SaaS, Industrial Precision, Craftsmanship, Reliable, High-Tech

mono.usage: Data points, KPI numbers, order IDs, technical specs (dimensions, print time, temperature)

storefront.container: container mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl

component_patterns.storefront_hero: Immersive 3D layout. Huge typography (Outfit), text-zinc-950 dark:text-white. Glassmorphism nav header (z-50). Hero image uses backdrop blur or subtle dark gradient overlay (bg-black/30 max) if text contrast is needed.
component_patterns.buttons: Apple-like pill or slightly rounded. Primary: bg-zinc-900 text-white dark:bg-zinc-50 dark:text-zinc-900. Accent Action (Print/Buy): bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 text-white. Subtle transform hover: -translate-y-0.5.
component_patterns.cards_storefront: Bento-style layout. High padding (p-8). Use glassmorphism if overlapping visuals.
component_patterns.cards_dashboard: Flat, dense. 'Control Room Grid'. 1px borders, no heavy shadows. KPIs use JetBrains Mono for numbers. Strict alignment.
component_patterns.status_badges: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), px-2.5 py-0.5, text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider. Colors map to specific statuses (e.g., Printing = Amber, Completed = Emerald).

design_rules.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly define hover text and bg colors with smooth transition (duration-200 ease-out).
design_rules.accessibility: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast. Use data-testid on all interactive elements. Visible focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500 focus:ring-offset-2).
design_rules.animations: Framer motion for page transitions (fade & slide up). Staggered list entrances. Hover scaling (scale-105) on product cards.

iconography.style: Clean, minimal stroke-width-1.5, matching text color.

hero_backgrounds.description: 3D printer in action close up, industrial precision.
3D printer with blue LED light, high tech mood.

abstract_objects.description: White diamond abstract 3D object on black.
Purple 3D printed vase with organic ridges.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard Shadcn UI components but heavily customize cards to match 'Apple-inspired minimal' aesthetics.
For storefront: Use generous padding (py-24), large text (Outfit font), and glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) for headers and overlapping overlays.
For dashboard: Implement 'Control Room Grid' - dense, 1px borders, subtle radius, highly legible JetBrains Mono font for metrics and statuses.
Create a unified layout wrapper that switches themes (Light/Dark) contextually.
Order timelines must visually represent the 10-step flow.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid for testing.
